name: arctium lappa
title: best benefits of arctium lappa
description: Arctium lappa reduces inflammation, a beneficial effect characterized by the alleviation of redness, swelling, and pain in response to injury or disease. This benefit is crucial as excessive inflammation can lead to chronic conditions such as arthritis, atherosclerosis, and even cancer, as seen in conditions like colitis and periodontitis. The plant's anti-inflammatory properties are attributed to the presence of bioactive constituents like arctiin, arctigenin, and lappaol, which have ...
